aggregation_formula: Direct file metadata and SHA-256 digest.
filtering_rules: Latest files at the user-supplied paths.
denominator: One source, one PDF, and one bibliography file.

aggregation_formula: Direct transcription of PR-threshold rows.
filtering_rules: threshold_type=PR; five outer-test folds per model.
denominator: Five overlapping outer-fold test partitions per model family.

aggregation_formula: Arithmetic mean, sample SD, minimum, and maximum over five PR-threshold outer-fold metrics.
filtering_rules: One PR-threshold row per model and outer fold.
denominator: Five fold-level repetitions; training partitions overlap.

aggregation_formula: Normalised discrete trapezoidal AULC-F1 over labelled count; terminal row is maximum labelled count.
filtering_rules: mode=benchmark, setup=ensemble_calibrated, evaluation_dataset=holdout.
denominator: Five overlapping outer-fold conditions per strategy and n0.

aggregation_formula: Foldwise mean/sample-SD/range plus pooled selected-label yield and mean per-run Levenshtein diversity.
filtering_rules: benchmark ensemble_calibrated holdout; initial_label_count=10.
denominator: Five overlapping folds; 500 selected records per strategy across folds.

aggregation_formula: Foldwise mean/sample-SD/range plus pooled selected-label yield and mean per-run Levenshtein diversity.
filtering_rules: benchmark ensemble_calibrated holdout; initial_label_count=40.
denominator: Five overlapping folds; 500 selected records per strategy across folds.

aggregation_formula: Canonical corrected paired differences copied without modification.
filtering_rules: Benchmark rows as stored.
denominator: Five matched fold conditions per initial-label condition.

aggregation_formula: Exact join by canonical sequence between selected batch and reviewed CG-MD row; cumulative positives ordered by round and file order.
filtering_rules: Three branches, rounds 1-8, five rows per round.
denominator: 40 acquisitions per branch; 120 total.

aggregation_formula: Counts, positive fraction, and pairwise normalized Levenshtein diversity over each branch's 40 selected sequences.
filtering_rules: All eight completed rounds.
denominator: 40 unique sequences per branch.

aggregation_formula: Exact-sequence Jaccard overlap.
filtering_rules: All 40 selected sequences per branch.
denominator: Set union for each branch pair.

aggregation_formula: Direct transcription of terminal post-ingest holdout JSON metrics.
filtering_rules: surrogate_stage=post_ingest, round_id=8.
denominator: Same frozen 74-peptide holdout per branch.

aggregation_formula: Canonical executable strategy-selection table copied without numerical alteration.
filtering_rules: Ten Phase 2 benchmark strategies; random retained as baseline/control.
denominator: Combined n0=10 and n0=40 evidence.

aggregation_formula: One row per unique canonical simulated sequence; expected outcome is the conjunction AP_sasa(200 ns)>=1.75 and final-10-ns path-contact>=0.5.
filtering_rules: 120 Phase 3 reviewed simulations plus 29 complete primary Phase 4 simulations.
denominator: 149 unique trajectories; one retained trajectory per peptide.

aggregation_formula: Exact-sequence reconciliation; complete campaigns require analysis_complete plus both operational metrics; outcome derived by the Phase 3 threshold conjunction.
filtering_rules: All 30 archived policy-selection records.
denominator: Five records per policy; 29 assessed, one unassessed.

aggregation_formula: Reports only conflicting complete metric pairs for the same canonical sequence.
filtering_rules: Primary Phase 4 selected sequences.
denominator: Zero conflicts found.

aggregation_formula: Yield=sum(threshold outcome)/assessed records; coverage=assessed/5; descriptive metric ranges and selected-set Levenshtein diversity.
filtering_rules: Grouped by originating policy; unassessed record excluded from yield and retained in coverage.
denominator: Five archived records per policy.

aggregation_formula: Exact-sequence Jaccard overlap among archived policy batches.
filtering_rules: Five archived sequences per policy, before simulation exclusion.
denominator: Set union for each policy pair.

aggregation_formula: Canonical paired within-retained-pool trade-off table copied without modification.
filtering_rules: Five guided policies; random excluded from paired selector comparison.
denominator: Five utility-only and five similarity-aware candidates per guided policy.

aggregation_formula: Normalised discrete trapezoidal AULC-F1 over preregistered intervals; terminal metrics at 235 labels.
filtering_rules: holdout, initial_label_count=10, corrected completed Phase 5 aggregation.
denominator: Three overlapping outer-fold conditions per strategy.

aggregation_formula: Arithmetic mean, sample SD, minimum, maximum across three folds; target summaries transcribed from corrected aggregate.
filtering_rules: fold_count=3 corrected canonical aggregation.
denominator: Three overlapping fold conditions.

aggregation_formula: Descriptive mean/sample-SD/range and positive fraction over per-fold, per-step tied-rank Spearman correlations.
filtering_rules: metric=post_hoc_pre_query_log_loss, summary_type=spearman.
denominator: 135 fold-step correlations per strategy; repeated steps are not independent.

aggregation_formula: Wall-time descriptive summaries; summed wall hours treated as approximate GPU-hours because each job requested one GPU.
filtering_rules: Twelve successful Phase 5 replay jobs.
denominator: Three jobs per strategy.

aggregation_formula: Narrative synthesis of verified phase-specific summaries; no new statistical inference.
filtering_rules: Only completed canonical or corrected-canonical evidence.
denominator: Not applicable; qualitative evidence matrix.

aggregation_formula: Repository evidence audit classification.
filtering_rules: Known superseded, contradictory, or unresolved items.
denominator: Not applicable.
